criteria_version: search/inclusion_criteria.md §1 (Stage-1 title-abstract screen) — priority batch 5, ranks 400-499

decisions.reason: J Applied Soc Psych 2006 mall-intercept FITD experiment for teen-smoker smoking-cessation recruitment; eligible.
CyberPsych & Behavior 2003 N=1607 computer-mediated DITF for donation compliance; eligible.
Health Psych 2001 N=752 RCT on framing × ethnic targeting × mammography use; eligible.
J Language Soc Psych 2000 two studies on psychological reality of DITF; eligible (DITF compliance).
J Social Psych 1994 mall-based experiment on public image × compliance with raffle ticket purchase; eligible (field experiment, FITD, purchase compliance).
J Applied Soc Psych 1990 study on contract-framing × motivation × self-efficacy for smoking reduction; eligible.
Psychological Reports 1988 FITD application to friends vs strangers; eligible.
J Social Psych 1984 FITD experiment with account analysis (excuses/justifications) × compliance; eligible.
J Social Psych 1982 FITD experiment on anxiety-producing follow-up requests; eligible.
J Social Psych 1981 FITD/DITF compliance × task difficulty manipulation; eligible.
Engineering dissertation on plate anchor-soil interaction; false positive on 'anchor' (civil engineering); fails §2.1.
Acta Psychologica 2025 four studies (N=1040) on AI vs human doctor trust × epistemic authority × social proof; eligible (experimental, authority + social-proof, trust/decision outcome).
Psychology & Marketing 2024 lab study on regulatory fit × new-product recommendation click-through intent; eligible.
Applied Psychology Health and Well-being 2023 PMID pseudo-RCT on persuasive messages × outdoor smoking reduction; eligible.
Psychology & Marketing 2022 study on representational vs abstract imagery × regulatory fit; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, consumer outcome).
J Applied Soc Psych 2022 leaders' regulatory-fit messages → followers' motivation; organizational not consumer; need full text per §2.1.
J Management Accounting Research 2021 on goal-publicity × employee lowballing of self-set goals; employee-context not commercial-sales; need full text per §2.1.
Experimental Clinical Psychopharmacology 2021 on fixed/randomized price sequence × alcohol purchase task; behavioral-economics demand-curve task, not commercial decision; need full text per §2.1.
Social Science Research 2020 factorial survey on state coercion × tax compliance; tax-compliance not commercial-decision; need full text.
Frontiers in Psychology 2019 N=319 study on psychological distance from climate change × donation behavior; eligible (donation outcome per §4.4).
Int J Sport Exercise Psych 2016 longitudinal RCT on gain-framed messages × sport registration; eligible (RCT, framing, behavior outcome — registration is purchase-analog).
Psychophysiology 2016 fMRI/EEG study on neural signatures of social proof; basic neuroscience, not commercial decision; need full text per §2.1.
J Cross-Cultural Psych 2016 N=132 study on social-proof anti-stigma videos for depression in Asian students; mental-health stigma not commercial; need full text per §5.1.
Eur J Work and Org Psych 2013 three studies on regulatory fit × adaptation to change in employees; organizational not consumer; need full text per §2.1.
Health Psych 2013 study on low-self-control × heuristic-reliance (incl social-proof) for healthy food choices; eligible (experimental, social-proof, food-choice outcome).
Management Science 2012 laboratory experiments on reciprocity in eBay-style feedback giving → reputation/trust/trade efficiency; eligible (experimental, reciprocity, market-decision outcome).
Sport Exercise Performance Psych 2012 on regulatory fit improving golf-putting in top athletes; sport-task population not commercial; fails §2.1.
Psychological Reports 2012 on regulatory focus in avatar-based exergames; gaming-task not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Applied Psychology 2011 on initial-request nature × FITD effectiveness; eligible.
Acta Psychologica Sinica 2011 on regulatory fit chronic vs situational; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, persuasion outcome).
Social Psychology Quarterly 2007 on instrumental vs symbolic value of reciprocity in exchange; theoretical/conceptual; need full text per §4.5.
J Applied Soc Psych 2005 RCT on loss-framed prostate-exam pamphlet × Italian men attitudes; eligible (RCT, framing, attitude/behavior outcome).
Social Psychology Quarterly 2000 Prisoner's Dilemma study on in-group/out-group reciprocity; game-theory dilemma not commercial decision; fails §2.1.
J Social Issues 2000 review on social responses to computers (Reeves & Nass tradition); review, not RCT; need full text per §4.5.
JPSP 1999 — duplicate of i=14 (Davis & Knowles DTR); flag at dedup-extraction.
M/C Journal 2026 on political journalists on Twitter; not commercial-decision research; fails §2.1.
arXiv 2025 NomicLaw LLM legal deliberation; false positive on 'reciprocity' in agent context; not human decision-making; fails §2.1.
Journal of Philanthropy 2025 three experiments on concrete framing × donation effectiveness; eligible (experimental, construal framing, donation outcome).
Int J Contemporary Hospitality 2025 three experiments on framing × chatbot identity disclosure for travel/hospitality; eligible (experimental, framing, commercial-context outcome).
Int J Multidisciplinary Research 2025 review of hyper-personalization in marketing; secondary research, not RCT; need full text per §4.5.
Computers in Human Behavior Reports 2025 study on psychological techniques in phishing (Compliance Increase Rate metrics); eligible (commercial-analog compliance outcome, persuasion mechanisms).

2025 pilot evaluation of Bakwana Compliance Sheet (BCS) using commitment-consistency + reciprocity + framing for school-fee payment compliance; eligible (commercial-payment compliance, multiple mechanisms).
OSF 2025 preregistered study on social-proof dark patterns in online coach selection; eligible (preregistered experiment, social-proof, commercial booking decision).
ClinicalTrials.gov 2024 RCT on gain/loss-framed text messaging × drinking reduction in older adults; eligible (RCT, framing, behavior outcome).
British Food Journal 2023 multi-study analysis N=500 on social proof × herd behavior × food choices in young Chinese consumers; eligible.
Int J Public Opinion Research 2021 conceptual replication of prospect theory on gain/loss framing × COVID risky-choice preferences; eligible.
Int J Environmental Research and Public Health 2021 2×2 web experiment on framing × narrative × COVID-19 vaccination in Chinese students; eligible.
J Medical Internet Research 2021 systematic review + meta-analysis on framing × cancer prevention/detection behaviors; eligible (meta-analysis).
Science Communication 2021 2×2×2 experiment on framing × uncertainty × agency for COVID vaccination; eligible.
2020 N=284 online experiment on persuasive techniques in e-commerce × Turkish/Dutch cultural differences; eligible (experimental, multiple persuasion mechanisms, commercial outcome).

J Hospitality & Tourism Research 2020 between-subjects experiment on goal-framed messages × destination gender × travel decisions; eligible (experimental, framing, commercial-travel-decision outcome).
PLoS ONE 2019 study on framing × public support for environmental projects; eligible (experimental, framing, policy-support outcome).
Sustainability 2019 2×2 factorial experiment on framing × appeals × responsible-tourism behavior; eligible.
Food Policy 2019 study on consumer WTP × framing × issue involvement for food safety; eligible (experimental, framing, WTP outcome per §4.4).
Int J Conflict Management 2018 two scenario-based negotiation experiments (Hong Kong students + UK professionals) on DITF in repeated negotiation; eligible (experimental, DITF, negotiation outcome).
Autism 2018 self-report study on compliance in autistic individuals using Gudjonsson Compliance Scale; clinical autism population, not commercial-decision context; fails §2.1.
Behaviour and Information Technology 2018 on peer communication × social-proof ad evaluation in adolescents; eligible (experimental, social-proof, ad-attitude outcome).
Mayo Clinic Proceedings 2018 on offshore pharmaceutical-trial ethics; false positive on 'trial-close'; fails §2.1.
Homo Politicus 2017 on age × preference-for-consistency × FITD effectiveness; eligible (FITD, compliance outcome).
Int Review on Public and Nonprofit Marketing 2017 three field experiments on social-proof × donation compliance; eligible (field experiments, social-proof, donation outcome).
Revista de Administração de Empresas 2016 on visual art × regulatory fit × consumer evaluations of ads; eligible.
CUNY Academic Works 2015 dissertation on deviant sexual fantasy self-disclosure × DITF-type techniques in sex offenders; forensic clinical population, not commercial; fails §2.1.
Int J Nonprofit and Voluntary Sector 2015 experiment on framing × perceived susceptibility × charitable donation intention; eligible.
RePEc 2015 on scarcity + social-proof × online referral promotion campaign; eligible (experimental, two mechanisms, commercial referral outcome).
Recherche Applications Marketing 2015 three experimental studies on fake-review detection × consumer trust; eligible (experimental, social-proof, consumer-decision outcome).
2015 experiment on persuasive visual design × website (incl social-proof) on consumer impact; eligible.
Social Behavior and Personality 2013 experiment on four-walls technique (commitment-consistency by repeated 'yes'); eligible.
Southern Communication Journal 2011 3×2 experiment on TNA technique × prosocial vs commercial requester; eligible.
Int J Behavioral Nutrition 2010 systematic review of physical-activity message construction (incl framing); eligible (review of empirical literature).
2010 textbook 'Rational Choice in an Uncertain World' (Hastie & Dawes); textbook/conceptual not RCT; need full text per §4.5.
2007 RCT on reciprocity + commitment-consistency fridge-magnet gift × questionnaire response; eligible (RCT, two mechanisms, response compliance).
Journalism & Mass Comm Quarterly 2007 study on framing × desirability of end-states; eligible (framing manipulation, persuasion outcome).
Social Behavior and Personality 2006 experiment on social vs functional label in FITD; eligible.
UA Repository 2003 four experiments on persuasion-technique × information style × decision making; eligible.
Contemporary Accounting Research 1994 lab experiment on auditor lowballing × independence; eligible (experimental, lowball, pricing/independence outcome — direct lowball test).
OSF preprint on Need-for-Chaos × gain/loss framing × violent/risky behavior; political-psychology context not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Frontiers in Psychology 2021 N=319 study on framing × COVID self-care behaviors (health vs economic-focused); eligible.
European Review of Applied Psychology 2016 meta-analysis of low-ball compliance procedure; eligible (meta-analysis).
Health Psych 2007 RCT N=121 on framing × HPV vaccine acceptance in undergraduate women; eligible.
Psychology Health & Medicine 2007 N=140 study on framing × MMR vaccine intent for child; eligible.
J Applied Soc Psych 2003 study on need-for-cognition × framing × smoking cessation; eligible.
J Applied Soc Psych 2001 study on visual + auditory framing × tobacco attitudes/behaviors; eligible.
Psychological Reports 1977 study on DITF + legitimization of paltry contributions; eligible.
Health Communication 2026 replicable positive-emotion pathway study on visual gain framing × continued exercise; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior outcome).
Quarterly Journal of Marketing 2026 review on regulatory fit and regulatory mode fit in marketing research; eligible (review of empirical marketing literature).
Asian Communication Research 2022 on framing × message sidedness × GMO acceptance × reactance mediator; eligible (experimental, framing, consumer-acceptance outcome).
Asian Communication Research 2022 — duplicate of i=485; flag at dedup-extraction.
J Applied Psychology 2022 PMID on rudeness × anchoring; workplace/organizational context, need full text to check commercial-decision relevance.
British J Social Psychology 2022 PMID on compliments × compliance mechanisms; eligible (experimental, reciprocity-adjacent, compliance outcome).
Business Communication Research 2020 case-study/manual-development for duty-free service; not RCT; need full text per §4.5.
Judgment and Decision Making 2020 field study on gain/loss × regulatory fit × NFL cheating; sport-context cheating, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Health Communication 2020 PMID on framing × regulatory focus × HPV-vaccine narratives in Singapore; eligible.
Int J Marketing and Business 2019 on four Cs of customer service for small-scale cement industries; conceptual/case study, not RCT; need full text per §4.5.
Health Communication 2019 N=220 blog-story experiment on framing × HPV social norms × social-media metrics; eligible.
JESP 2019 on loss-framing × self-serving mistakes; cheating-context outcome, need full text per §2.1.
J Behavioral Decision Making 2019 on children cheating × loss framing × prior cheating; cheating-context outcome and child population, need full text per §2.1.
J Academy of Marketing Science 2018 study on scarcity effects on consumer decision journeys; eligible.
J Consumer Psychology 2018 self-regulatory model of resource scarcity for consumer behavior; eligible (review with empirical synthesis).
J Applied Psychology 2018 PMID on reciprocity × psychological-contract violation effects on third parties; workplace context, need full text for §2.1.
JEP General 2017 supplemental material for 'When Good Is Stickier Than Bad' on gain/loss asymmetries in sequential framing; eligible (experimental, framing, persuasion outcome).
